input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.3.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.3.2.1
            TITLE: the driver must wear a helmet which:

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.2.1: The driver must wear a helmet which:
VE.3.2.1 The driver must wear a helmet which: 
a. Is closed face with an integral, immovable chin guard  
b. Contains an integrated visor/face shield supplied with the helmet 
c. Meets an approved standard  
d. Is properly labeled for that standard

final_answer: VE.3.2.1 The driver must wear a helmet which: a. Is closed face with an integral, immovable chin guard b. Contains an integrated visor/face shield supplied with the helmet c. Meets an approved standard d. Is properly labeled for that standard
